details: :split opens another split on the current file
Use it when stacked editing is easier

tips.summary: Open a file in a split :split {file}
details: :split {file} opens that file in a new split
:vsplit {file} does it side by side
:vsplit opens a side-by-side view
Useful for compare-style editing

tips.summary: Split from the keyboard Ctrl-w s / Ctrl-w v
details: Ctrl-w s splits horizontally
Ctrl-w v splits vertically
:close or Ctrl-w c closes this split
Use it when you want to keep other splits
:only keeps the current split
Ctrl-w o does the same from Normal mode

tips.summary: Cycle through splits Ctrl-w w / W
details: Ctrl-w w goes to the next split
Ctrl-w W goes to the previous split

tips.summary: Move to a split Ctrl-w h/j/k/l
details: Use h j k l for left down up right
Arrow keys also work after Ctrl-w
Ctrl-w + taller, Ctrl-w - shorter
Ctrl-w = makes splits equal size

tips.summary: Browse the project tree with NERDTree
details: Use :set NERDTree to enable the plugin
:NERDTreeToggle opens the tree
:NERDTreeFind reveals the current file
